meta_title: For Founders: idea validation to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to idea validation and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Idea Validation: Stop Abandoning Your SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Stop the cycle of abandoned projects. Learn how to validate your SaaS idea quickly using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led case study.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is building without validation. By shifting from 'coding first' to 'validating first' using Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you eliminate feature creep. This approach ensures you only build what users are willing to pay for, guaranteeing market fit before investment.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'perfectly coded' apps that no one wanted. You start with a spark of genius, spend weeks in a code-dopamine loop, and hit the wall of reality: absolute silence from the market. This isn't a failure of your technical skill; it's a failure of your feedback loop.

The secret isn't more discipline—it's radical validation. By leveraging AI-driven tools, we can collapse months of development into hours of validation, ensuring your next project isn't just finished, but profitable.

steps.title: Define the Value Prop
steps.description: Before writing code, clearly define the 'Job to be Done'. Use Antigravity to generate a landing page copy that focuses on pain, not features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a world-class SaaS product manager. Create a high-converting landing page structure for a SaaS tool that solves [Problem]. Focus on the emotional pain points of the user and clearly state the unique value proposition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a landing page copy based on the Antigravity output that focuses on conversion and pain-point resolution.'

steps.title: Map the MVP Feature Set
steps.description: Strip away everything that isn't core to the primary value. We only want the 'Must-Haves' for the first release.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value proposition and list only the 3 essential features required for a functional MVP. Remove all 'nice-to-have' bloat that delays launch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude architect --file mvp_features.md --instruction 'Draft the technical architecture for these 3 features only.'

steps.title: Generate the Scaffold
steps.description: Use Claude Code to establish the project structure. We need a clean, maintainable foundation that allows for rapid pivots.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure and boilerplate code for a Next.js + Supabase SaaS MVP, optimized for speed and readability.

steps.title: Build the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Implement a simple capture mechanism to collect user emails or waitlist signups before the full app is finished.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React component for a waitlist capture form that integrates with Resend or a simple Supabase table.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push the MVP to a live URL. The goal isn't 'completion'—it's getting the first user sign-up.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a checklist for deploying this MVP to Vercel and setting up basic environment variables for production.

pro_tips: Never build an auth system from scratch; use Supabase or Clerk to save 20+ hours of development time.
If you aren't embarrassed by your first version, you launched too late.
Treat your landing page as your most important piece of code; if the copy doesn't convert, the backend doesn't matter.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code every 2 hours to keep technical debt from accumulating during the sprint.
Price your product from Day 1, even if it's just a 'Pre-order' button; money is the only true validation metric.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, run 50 cold outreaches to your target audience. If you get 5 signups, iterate. If you get zero, pivot the value proposition without changing the underlying code.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum and start shipping software that solves actual problems. Our community provides the feedback and technical support you need to push past the 'unfinished' phase. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
